title: qwen3 default thinking-mode adds a ~113s hidden reasoning block to structured-JSON extraction, blowing the 30s domain-extraction budget into the degraded fallback
source: redteam-adversarial-interrogation (live evo-x2 prod, both models WARM)

certification.note: Code + unit tests authored and PASSING locally via ./smackerel.sh test unit --python. The live 'domain extraction now < 30s' claim is only provable after the orchestrator rebuilds + signs + redeploys smackerel-ml on evo-x2 — live verification PENDING redeploy.

notes: Remaining half of the redteam F2 (LLM-enrichment latency) finding. The keep_alive fix (BUG-026-006 sibling + ml/app/ollama_keepalive.py) removed the ~22-45s Ollama cold-load; this fixes the ~113s qwen3 hidden-reasoning latency on the structured-JSON extraction path by adding an SST-gated, fail-loud thinking-disable (ML_STRUCTURED_EXTRACTION_THINKING / services.ml.structured_extraction_thinking). The agent reasoning path (agent.py) is deliberately left thinking-ON (quality > latency). Requires a smackerel-ml image rebuild + signed redeploy to take effect.
